title: Stripe Tax Extension for WooCommerce
excerpt: Learn about the Stripe Tax Extension for WooCommerce. Use the Stripe Tax Extension for WooCommerce to automatically calculate [sales tax, VAT, and GST](https://docs.stripe.com/tax/calculating.md) and apply the accurate tax rate for all of your transactions. Stripe Tax pricing is usage-based. For Stripe Tax Extension for WooCommerce pricing, see [API integration with Stripe Tax](https://support.stripe.com/questions/understanding-stripe-tax-pricing). > This plugin doesn’t support test mode. When using your WooCommerce instance for tests or development, deactivate the plugin in the WooCommerce backoffice. > Stripe provides 30 days of free calculations for new users of the Stripe Tax WooCommerce connector. This lets you test and complete your integrations without being billed.…
